description: Verify that a registered user can log in with email+password and reach the products dashboard

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Enter email: qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com
Enter password: HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Click the Sign In / Login button
Verify the page has navigated away from /auth/login (no error message visible, no '401' or 'Invalid credentials' text on screen)
Verify the page URL is /products or /overview or similar dashboard page (NOT still /auth/login)
Report: what URL did the browser land on? What content is visible on screen? Screenshot the final state.

description: Verify the products page is accessible after login and shows a meaningful empty state when user has no product grants

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Log in with email qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com and password HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/products
Verify the page loads without a 500 error, blank screen, or unhandled exception
Report: what is shown on screen — product cards, empty state message, error, or something else? Screenshot.
Check: is there a meaningful call-to-action for a user with no grants (e.g. 'Get started' or 'Add a product')?

description: Verify error handling for invalid credentials on the login page

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Enter email: completely-wrong@notreal.com
Enter password: wrongpassword123
Click Sign In / Login button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to /products — they should stay on /auth/login
Verify an error message is shown (e.g. 'Invalid credentials', 'Email or password incorrect', 'Login failed')
Verify the error message does NOT reveal whether the email exists or not (no 'email not found' vs 'wrong password' distinction)
Report: what error text appeared? Was account enumeration prevented? Screenshot.

description: Verify the user Settings / Profile page is accessible and functional after login

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Log in with email qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com and password HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/settings
Verify the page loads without error — expect a settings or profile form to be visible
Verify the user's email address is displayed or pre-filled in the form
Check the page for: broken links (404), missing images (broken img src), console errors in page output, or obvious unstyled content
Report: does the settings page load correctly? What fields are shown? Screenshot the full page.

description: Verify the superadmin panel at /admin loads its tabs correctly for an admin user

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/auth/login
Log in with email vivek@phronex.com and password Phronex.vivek.2026!
If login fails (wrong credentials), report the error and stop — do not proceed further
Navigate to http://localhost:3002/admin
Verify the admin panel loads (NOT a 403 or blank page)
Verify at least 3 tabs are visible in the admin panel (e.g. Users, System Errors, Analytics, Configuration)
Click each visible tab and verify it loads content without a 500 error or blank state
Report: which tabs loaded successfully? Any broken tabs? Screenshot of admin panel. Note the URL structure.
